t_ch: 二维市已经渡过了最艰难的时刻，是继续前进，还是将怪物全数解决？英雄，你来决定！
t_en: Duomension City has made it through the worst of it! Hero, now it's your call. Do we press on, or wipe out the monsters entirely? Hero, you decide!

t_ch: 藏身此处的怪兽竟不知何时灰飞烟灭了！
t_en: The monsters that were hiding here seem to have been reduced to nothing.

t_ch: 是谁？到底是谁？难道是——
t_en: Who is it? Who could it be? Is that...

t_ch: 就让我们俩探探你的实力。
t_en: Let the two of us see what you're made of.

t_ch: 来吧！大名鼎鼎的开拓者{NICKNAME}。
t_en: Come on! One and only Trailblazer {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 不愧是星穹列车的英雄…好强！
t_en: As expected of the Astral Express hero... so powerful!

t_ch: 接下来就交给大哥和小灰了！
t_en: Boss, Gray, I'll leave the rest to you!

t_ch: 和您交手，是我的荣幸！
t_en: The honor is mine to cross blades with you!

t_ch: 作为英雄，我们可绝不会后退。
t_en: As heroes, we'll never back down.

t_ch: 这是饱含我全部敬意的一击！来吧！
t_en: This strike contains all my respect! Bring it on!

t_ch: …什么？就连无敌的{NICKNAME}也要到达极限了吗！
t_en: ...What? Even the invincible {NICKNAME} is reaching {M#his}{F#her} limit!?

t_ch: 听啊！那是人们的愿望，那是汇聚而至的力量！那是，无限的可能性！
t_en: Listen! Those are the people's wishes, power converging as one! That is... limitless possibility!

t_ch: 大家的愿望…我收到了！
t_en: Everyone's wishes... I've received them all!

t_ch: 开拓——无限——
t_en: Trailblaze... INFINITY...

t_ch: 呜啊…{NICKNAME}前辈好近，我的心跳得好大声……
t_en: Woah... my senior {NICKNAME} is so close to me that my heart's beating like crazy...

t_ch: 三、二、一…
t_en: Three... Two... One...

t_ch: 暗夜终尽，黎明降临！破晓战队，登场！
t_en: Darkness wanes, and dawn awakens! The Daybreak Squadron arises!

t_ch: 这边，这边！
t_en: Over here, over here!

t_ch: 诸位，登上这架电梯，直至顶层即可。
t_en: Dear guests, please take this elevator straight to the top floor.

t_ch: 请告知真珠女士，列车的三位客人即将抵达。
t_en: Please inform Madam Pearl that the three guests from the Express will arrive shortly.

t_ch: 我为几位客人准备了一些茶点，请尝尝。
t_en: I've prepared some refreshments for you. Please help yourself.

t_ch: 你要往哪儿跑啊？真珠女士和我们的磋商还没结束呢！
t_en: Where do you think you're going? Our negotiations with Madam Pearl aren't over yet!

t_ch: 大家好，欢迎收看满愿电视台《乐园早知道》特别新闻栏目！我是主持人噗噗！
t_en: Hello everyone, welcome to Fulwish TV's special news segment, Arcadian Morning Report! I'm your host, Poofy!

t_ch: 大家好，我是主持人雪雪！
t_en: Hi everyone, I'm your host, Snowie!

t_ch: 由珠星财团出资，速建重工承接建设的「星铁FES」展会现场正式竣工。
t_en: The "Star Rail Fest" exhibition venue, funded by Pearluxe Corp and constructed by Turbogen Heavy Industries, has officially been completed.

t_ch: 凭借现代化的幻造技术，仅耗时一日，天际线观览云岛上就展现一派全新气象。
t_en: Thanks to modern imagenesis technology, it took only a day for the skyline's Lookout Cloud to take on a completely new look.

t_ch: 从今天开始，「观览云岛线」正式开通「星铁FES」展区站点。
t_en: Starting today, the Lookout Cloud Line is officially opening up a stop for the Star Rail Fest exhibition areas.

t_ch: 首日开放的展区包含「贝洛伯格区」、「仙舟罗浮区」、「匹诺康尼区」三处，为您呈现星穹列车的传奇冒险之旅。在建中的「翁法罗斯区」也将随后续计划开放。
t_en: The exhibition areas opening on day one include the Belobog Area, Xianzhou Luofu Area, and Penacony Area, showcasing the legendary adventures of the Astral Express. The Amphoreus Area, which is currently under construction, will open in due course.

t_ch: 在本次活动中，珠星诚邀星穹列车的多位乘员莅临参观、接受采访——其中包括最近加入「幻月游戏」，成为谒者的{NICKNAME}。
t_en: For this event, Pearluxe cordially invites several crew members of the Astral Express to visit and be interviewed, including {NICKNAME}, who recently joined the Phantasmoon Games as a Supplicant.

t_ch: 那可真是太令人期待了！听说珠星还邀请到了《苍天航路绒绒号》的漫画作者模糊二维马老师到场签售，这也会是作者本人首次以真面目亮相……
t_en: That is certainly something to look forward to! I heard Pearluxe has also invited Blurry_QR_Colt, the author of Fluffy Across the Blue, for a signing session. It'll be the first time the author reveals their true face in public...

t_ch: 一场敛聚愿力的展会，确实是个有趣的企划。得亏真珠能想出这个奇怪的点子。
t_en: An exhibition to gather Wishpower, now that's an interesting scheme. Leave it to Pearl to come up with such a bizarre idea.

t_ch: 毕竟这是珠星的优势。
t_en: Well, that is Pearluxe's forte.

t_ch: 珠星擅长为孩子和成年人营造梦想，而星穹列车正是一个令这个世界倍感新奇的天外之梦。
t_en: Pearluxe excels at creating dreams for both children and adults, and the Astral Express is exactly the kind of otherworldly dream that fascinates the people of this world.

t_ch: 这样做倒是对双方都有利。
t_en: This arrangement works out well for both parties.

t_ch: 唔，真珠也在动用珠星的资源为我们进行宣传。
t_en: Mm-hmm, Pearl is also mobilizing Pearluxe's resources to promote us.

t_ch: 在和真珠对谈时，我向她提过「成为风帆，共同进退」的理念。这一场合作，确实发挥出了我们各自的优势。
t_en: When I talked with Pearl, I shared with her the idea of becoming a sail, advancing and retreating together. This collaboration could truly bring out the best of our respective strengths.

t_ch: 我有时候也会猜想，翡翠将我们邀请到这里，是否有为自己的同僚送上「幻月游戏胜利砝码」的意图……
t_en: Sometimes I wonder if Jade invited us here with the intention of giving her colleagues a "winning edge" in the Phantasmoon Games...

t_ch: 对真珠而言，这场星神游戏恐怕也是学习和观察我们行动风格的好机会。
t_en: For Pearl, this Aeonic game is probably also a good opportunity to observe and study the way we operate.

t_ch: 不过，比起咱们平日里打交道的对手，这位智械执行官倒是难得的理性决策者，她的合作提议相对更值得信任。
t_en: Though, compared to our usual opponents, this Intellitron executive is a surprisingly rational decision-maker. Her proposal for cooperation seems more trustworthy than most.

t_ch: 比起理性，我更担心「非理性」的因素……
t_en: It's not rationality that concerns me. It's the "irrational" factors...

t_ch: 你是说…新告死魔？
t_en: You mean... the new Herald of Death?

t_ch: 没错。鸽川血案的消息已经在网上传开了，虽然「异常防御部」的人尽力压制了各种流言传播的势头，但许多人还是把它和十五年前的告死魔联系在了一起。
t_en: Exactly. News of the Dovebrook bloodbath has already blown up online. The Department of Aberration Defense tried to clamp down on the rumors, but plenty of people are still linking it to the Herald of Death from fifteen years ago.

t_ch: 这场汇集人数众多的展会很有可能成为目标，被新告死魔利用。
t_en: With such a large crowd gathering there, this exhibition could very well become a target for the new Herald of Death.

t_ch: 真珠对这样的情况，应该不至于毫无准备吧？
t_en: Pearl must have contingency plans for situations like this, right?

t_ch: 也许我们就是暗手。
t_en: Maybe we're the ace up her sleeve.

t_ch: 可能是那位路过的侦探。
t_en: It could be that detective "who passed by".

t_ch: 那个大叔？不会吧！
t_en: That old guy? No way!

t_ch: 无论真珠有什么准备，我们都要将告死魔袭击现场的可能性考虑在内。这次出席，我们除了向这个世界的民众展示星穹列车的形象外，还要随时警惕任何异动。
t_en: Whatever Pearl has planned, we must consider the possibility that the Herald of Death might attack the venue. We won't just be there to showcase the Astral Express to the people of this world. We'll also need to stay on high alert for any suspicious activity.

t_ch: 时间差不多了，你们该出发了。
t_en: It's about time. You should get going.

t_ch: 「你们」？杨叔不去吗？
t_en: Just us? Aren't you coming with us, Mr. Yang?

t_ch: 列车上总得有人留守，陪陪列车长，也好随时响应突发事件啊。
t_en: Someone's got to stay behind on the Express to keep the conductor company and be ready for any emergencies that pop up.

t_ch: 你们几个，游玩时也要注意安全，有任何情况随时联络我。
t_en: You guys have fun out there, but stay safe. Contact me right away if anything comes up.

t_ch: 丹恒和星期日呢？
t_en: What about Dan Heng and Sunday?

t_ch: 他们俩都随爻光将军行动去了。丹恒在追踪刃的下落，星期日与停云小姐一起行动，都脱不开身。这一次的展会应该没法到场了。
t_en: They're both out on a mission with General Yao Guang. Dan Heng is tracking Blade's whereabouts, while Sunday is working with Miss Tingyun. Both of them are tied up. Looks like they won't be able to make it to the exhibition this time.

t_ch: 那咱们走咯。
t_en: Alright, let's get going then.

t_ch: 得，分享一路见闻的重任又落在小三月的肩膀上咯。那我多拍几张照片，回来后好跟你们好好讲讲展会的事情。
t_en: Hah, looks like the heavy burden of documenting our travels falls on yours truly once again. I'll make sure to snap tons of pics, so I can tell you guys all about the exhibition when we get back!

t_ch: 出发，「星铁FES」！
t_en: Star Rail FEST, here we come!

t_ch: 请前往「星铁FES」的乘客做好上车准备。啊！这不是星穹列车的英雄吗！
t_en: Passengers heading to Star Rail Fest, please prepare to board. Ah! If it isn't the heroes of the Astral Express!

t_ch: 车车们早就在打赌，谁能在展会开启当天迎接无名客前往「星铁FES」——这可是超乐园级的殊荣哎！没想到，幸运儿竟是我！
t_en: The trains have been placing bets on who'll get to escort the Nameless to Star Rail FEST on opening day. It's such a suuuper-duper arcadian honor! And can you believe it? Turns out I'm the lucky one!

t_ch: 这一路上我已经感受到大家的热情化作愿力的浪潮，难怪兄弟姐妹们跑起来都倍儿有精神！
t_en: I could already feel everyone's enthusiasm turning into waves of Wishpower along the way! No wonder everyone's running around with such high spirits!

t_ch: 出发吧。
t_en: Let's go.

t_ch: 噔～噔～蹬～蹬，列车即将启动，请英雄们坐稳扶好。
t_en: Ding~ Ding~ Dong~ Dong~ The Express is about to depart. Heroes, please stay seated and hold on tight.

t_ch: 本专列开往：「星铁FES」展会。乐子神在上，愿二相乐园的微笑能晕染你我的面庞。
t_en: This special train is bound for the "Star Rail FEST" Exhibition. By The Laughter above, may the smile of Planarcadia grace our faces.

t_ch: 我们还有事。
t_en: We have things to take care of.

t_ch: 啊！你、你们不会嫌我话多，要等下一列吧！这种事情，不要哇！
t_en: Ah! Y—You guys aren't thinking of waiting for the next train just 'cause I talk too much, are you!? Please don't do that to me!

t_ch: 嘿嘿，能接无名客前往星铁FES——这可是超乐园级的殊荣哎！我真是超乐园级的幸运！
t_en: Hehe, getting to escort the Nameless to Star Rail FEST... What a suuuper-duper arcadian honor! I'm just sooo lucky!

t_ch: 还等什么，诸位，出发吧！
t_en: What are we waiting for, everyone? Let's get going!

t_ch: 出发吧。
t_en: Let's go.

t_ch: 我们还有事。
t_en: We have things to take care of.

t_ch: 我会耐心等待英雄们做好准备的，今天不接上你们我是不会发车的！
t_en: I'll patiently wait around until you heroes are ready. I'm not taking off without you today!

t_ch: 家人们，我已安全入场，没有抢到票的小伙伴们，今天可以在我的直播间带各位看完整个FES。
t_en: Chat, I've made it in safely! For those who couldn't get tickets, you can catch the entire FEST through my livestream today.

t_ch: 身边这位是我的搭……你这是在干什么？
t_en: Next to me is my partn— Wait, what are you doing?

t_ch: 我是冷面小青龙——丹恒是也！
t_en: Tis I, Cold Dragon Young... Dan Heng!

t_ch: 你哪里搞的头套，这也太怪了。
t_en: Where'd you get that mask from? It looks so weird.

t_ch: 顾不了那么多是也。当务之急是找到模糊二维马老师给我的漫画签名是也。
t_en: Such trifles matter not! What doth matter most is securing the autograph of Master Blurry_QR_Colt upon this book of mine!

t_ch: 签名会还没到时间呢。再说仙舟人说话并不会每一句都带「是也」的。
t_en: The signing event hasn't even started yet. Besides, Xianzhou people don't talk like that.

t_ch: 我们的口号是？
t_en: What's our motto?

t_ch: 跨越星海，家在这里！列车全员，永不分离！
t_en: Through stars we soar, the Express is our home! One crew one heart, we'll never roam!

t_ch: 哇，这是何等的厨力！
t_en: Wow, that's some next-level fandom energy!

t_ch: 星穹列车，我们喜欢你，我们喜欢{NICKNAME}、三月七、丹恒！
t_en: Astral Express, we love you! We love {NICKNAME}, March 7th, and Dan Heng!

t_ch: 星穹列车，我们喜欢你，我们喜欢列车长、姬子、瓦尔特！
t_en: Astral Express, we love you! We love the conductor, Himeko, and Welt!

t_ch: 他们漏掉了星期日…
t_en: They forgot about Sunday...

t_ch: 嘘，嘘，这里可不比翁法罗斯啊，当心有「家族」的人听到。关于星期日先生的事咱们还是少在公开场合提为妙。
t_en: Shh, shh, this isn't Amphoreus, y'know. Watch what you say. The Family's got ears everywhere. It's best if we keep quiet about Mr. Sunday while we're out in public.

t_ch: 他们漏掉了「闭嘴」…
t_en: They forgot about Shush...

t_ch: 总觉得带上「闭嘴」，会让每句话都像是在吵架。
t_en: I feel like adding "Shush" to a sentence always makes it sound like an argument.

t_ch: 要去合个影吗，姬子？
t_en: Wanna take a photo together, Himeko?

t_ch: 不、不用了，比起被自己的粉丝簇拥，我还是更喜欢和真珠谈判的严肃氛围。
t_en: N-No thanks. I'd take tense negotiations with Pearl over getting mobbed by my own fans any day.

t_ch: 居然还有让姬子姐害怕的社交场合。
t_en: Who'd've thought there'd be social situations that even Himeko's afraid of?

t_ch: 要是丹恒和杨叔也在…很难想象他们看到这一幕会露出什么表情。
t_en: If Dan Heng and Mr. Yang were here... I can't even imagine the looks on their faces.

t_ch: 此情此景，真是……
t_en: What a sight... truly...

t_ch: …只想邀诸位共赏。
t_en: ...I wish we could share this all with our friends.

t_ch: 我很确定丹恒一定不会想赏这个景啦。
t_en: I'm pretty sure Dan Heng wouldn't want to experience this.

t_ch: 欢愉，很有乐园味儿。
t_en: Elation, it really has that arcadian vibe.

t_ch: 无论如何，我从没想过星穹列车会在我的故乡变成一个…大受欢迎的偶像团体，还会有以我们的冒险旅程为原型的漫画与动画。
t_en: Never in my wildest dreams did I imagine that the Astral Express would become... a super popular idol group in my homeland, complete with book and TV adaptations based on our adventures.

t_ch: 但不得不说，这确实很二相乐园。
t_en: But I have to admit, this is very Planarcadia.

t_ch: 不愧是星穹列车。
t_en: That's just how the Astral Express rolls!

t_ch: 嗯嗯！不愧是咱们！
t_en: Exactly! That's just how we roll!

t_ch: 这么多粉丝，比咱们着陆那天车站里来迎接的数量还多…搞得我都有些飘飘然了。
t_en: So many fans out there, even more than the crowd that came to welcome us at the station when we landed... It's kinda going to my head.

t_ch: 哎！不行不行！我们必须万分戒备，谁知道那个谒者会不会藏在人群中对我们和我们的粉丝图谋不轨！所以……
t_en: Hold on, that's not good! We need to be on high alert. Who knows if that Supplicant is hiding in the crowd, plotting something against us and our fans! So...

t_ch: 所以，本姑娘要以身涉险，亲自去排查一下。
t_en: So, I'm gonna brave the danger and check things out myself.

t_ch: 你只是想去玩对吧？
t_en: You just want to go have fun, don't you?

t_ch: 你，知道的太多了！
t_en: You talk too much!

t_ch: 嗯，我也一起！
t_en: All right, count me in!

t_ch: 一起一起！
t_en: You bet, let's do this!

t_ch: 可不要走太远，一会儿还有官方人员需要我们配合进行演讲之类的活动。
t_en: Don't wander off too far, though. We still have official business later... speeches and other activities that we need to show up for.

t_ch: 知道啦，我们就在这附近转转。
t_en: Got it. We'll just hang around here.

t_ch: 你们去逛吧，我也在这儿到处看看。
t_en: You guys go explore. I'll take a look around here too.

t_ch: 啊！你这身打扮，扮演「三月兔」的原型是吧？还原度好高啊喂！
t_en: Wow! With that outfit, you must be cosplaying as March Bunny, am I right? The accuracy is just insane!

t_ch: 是啊，好还原啊。
t_en: Yeah, just like the original.

t_ch: 大家都是同好，推销介绍什么的就免了。但我要事先说明，列车长天下第一可爱！
t_en: Since we're all fans here, let's skip the sales pitch. But I gotta say this upfront: The conductor is the cutest in the whole universe!

t_ch: 这我同意，列车长天下第一可爱！不过走近一瞧，有的东西似乎很眼熟？
t_en: I agree. The conductor is the cutest in the whole universe! But wait a minute, some of your stuff looks familiar to me...

t_ch: 有眼力！一看就是重度粉丝。
t_en: Sharp eye! You're definitely a hardcore fan.

t_ch: 我们与开拓之旅途径世界的艺术家进行深度合作，才制作出了这些产品。
t_en: We collaborated closely with artists from different worlds along the trailblazing expedition to create these products.

t_ch: 哈哈，我大概能猜到都有谁。
t_en: Haha, I can pretty much guess who they are.

t_ch: 鄙人不才，没有大师们的美术功底，但也撰写过些小文章，在同人圈算小有人气。这次出摊，顺便也替自己宣传宣传。
t_en: I may not be that talented or have the artistic skills of a master, but I've written some articles and gained a bit of popularity in the fan community. So while I'm here at the booth, I thought I might as well do some self-promotion.

t_ch: 你的视线向桌上投去，顷刻间，触目惊心的文字映入你剧震的瞳孔。
t_en: Your gaze falls upon the table, and in an instant, the shocking words sear themselves into your widening eyes.

t_ch: 《美少女三月的忧郁》
t_en: The Melancholy of March

t_ch: 以第一人称视角讲述粉毛美少女三月的冒险小说，充满作者最黑暗深邃的校园幻想。
t_en: A novel recounting the adventures of the pink-haired beauty March from a first-person POV, filled with the author's darkest, deepest school-life fantasies.

t_ch: 「你们中如果有超级骇客、星际战士、言灵能力者、或身负星神诅咒的人，就来找我吧，咱就把话搁这儿了。」
t_en: "If any of you happen to be super hackers, space warriors, spirit whisperers, or those cursed by Aeons, come find me. I've said my piece."

t_ch: 「在虚构的故事中寻找真实感，这可是人之常情啊！」
t_en: "Looking for a sense of truth in fictional stories is just human nature!"

t_ch: 《幻想银浒传》
t_en: Outlaws of the Galaxy

t_ch: 根据仙舟古典话本改编的幻想小说。讲述鲁珀特二世与一百零八位智械豪杰的爱恨情仇，并最终因其陨落的宏大历史传奇。
t_en: A fantasy novel adapted from a classic Xianzhou script. It chronicles the epic saga of Rubert II and the love and hatred shared among the one hundred and eight Intellitron heroes, ultimately leading to his downfall.

t_ch: 「鲁珀特二世，智周寰宇，深察玄微，博识尊赐其尊号曰『智深』。」
t_en: "Rubert II, wise throughout the universe, profound in his insights, was bestowed the title 'Profound One' by Nous."

t_ch: 「若二世哥哥欢喜，我等便杀上王座，夺了鲁珀特一世那厮的鸟位！」
t_en: "If it pleases you, my king, we shall storm the throne and snatch that bloody seat from Rubert I!"

t_ch: 「银河向东流，鲁珀特的野史参星斗。」
t_en: "Among the countless stars are whispered the secret chronicles of Rubert."

t_ch: 《列车<unbreak>40</unbreak>K》
t_en: Express 40,000

t_ch: 讲述第九开拓帝国的皇帝帕姆，与麾下的二十位无名客义子一同征服宇宙的战争题材小说。
t_en: A war-themed novel recounting the story of Emperor Pom-Pom from the Ninth Trailblaze Empire and, under their command, twenty adopted children of the Nameless, as they conquered the universe together.

t_ch: 「我们的征途只有星辰大海！」
t_en: "Our destiny lies only among the sea of stars!"

t_ch: 「开拓帝国历<unbreak>40000</unbreak>年六月一日，凌晨二时五十五分，杨瓦特的生命在三十三岁的时候倒下了。」
t_en: "On June 1st, year <unbreak>40,000</unbreak> of the Trailblaze Empire Era, at 2:<unbreak>55</unbreak> AM, Watt Yang's life came to an end at the age of thirty-three."

t_ch: 「三分钟后，他再次坐了起来。」
t_en: "Three minutes later, he sat up again."

t_ch: 《家有星核》
t_en: Home with Stellaron

t_ch: 出乎意料地以星核宿主小浣熊为主角的家庭题材同人漫画。
t_en: A surprisingly wholesome family-themed fancomic starring a raccoon who hosts a Stellaron.

t_ch: 讲述银河顶级通缉犯组成家庭并执行各种任务的趣事，一家人还养了一只会代打游戏的猫，叫银狼。
t_en: A fun little tale about the cosmos's most wanted criminals forming a family and going on all sorts of missions. They even kept a cat that grinds video games for them... by the name of Silver Wolf.

t_ch: 「对不起，卡芙卡，离开你，你还能活下去，离开老叔，他就死了。」
t_en: "I'm sorry, Kafka. You can survive without me. But if I leave Mr. Yang, he won't make it."

t_ch: 「那银狼怎么办…难道你要把她放归大自然吗？」
t_en: "What about Silver Wolf... Are you planning to release her back into the wild?"

t_ch: 算了，翻开这些东西会幻听。
t_en: Forget it, looking through these things is making me hear things.

t_ch: 这地方的人真的什么都敢写，什么都敢画。真的……
t_en: The folks here seriously don't hold back. Nothing's off-limits to them...

t_ch: 买一件商品送一本小说，会场限定，先到先得哦。出手晚了，没准儿就成永远的遗憾了。
t_en: Buy one item, get a free novel! It's a venue-exclusive deal. First come, first served. Better act fast, or you might regret it forever!

t_ch: 前段日子的绒绒号玩偶刚上架就被一个神秘大叔截住，说什么…给学生当美术参考，跟进货似的装了一整车，连倒狗都抢不过他。
t_en: When The Fluffy figurines hit the shelves the other day, this mysterious old guy snatched them all up, saying something about... using them as art references for students. He loaded up a whole cart like he was stocking inventory. Even the scalpers were no match for him, I'd say!

t_ch: 他走后没多久，一兔耳朵的小妹也来买玩偶，这位一看就是收藏党，都是成套买。
t_en: Not long after he left, a girl with bunny ears came to buy figurines too. She was clearly a collector, buying complete sets of everything.

t_ch: 然后，她发现自己想收集的每个系列，都差了一只姬奇猫！所有姬奇猫都被大叔买走了。
t_en: Then, she discovered that in every collection she wanted, there was one Himekat missing! That old man bought all the Himekats.

t_ch: 这太恐怖了！不行，趁着还有货，我必须立刻使用我的钱包！
t_en: That's horrifying! I can't let this happen to me. I have to make the best use of my wallet while things are still in stock!

t_ch: 三月，这你也想买？
t_en: March, you're interested in this?

t_ch: 说得我都有点心动。
t_en: Now you're making me want one too.

t_ch: 不要中了消费陷阱啊！
t_en: Don't fall for this consumerist trap!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你有没有体验过那种，就，一些小商品看着很奇怪，但你就是忍不住去买，不知不觉——
t_en: {NICKNAME}, you know that feeling when you see some weird little gadgets, and you just can't help but buy them, and before you know it...

t_ch: 整个房间就堆满了，只能偷偷藏到好朋友那个大房间的床底下。
t_en: Your whole room is full of stuff, so you have to secretly hide them under your best friend's big bed.

t_ch: 啊～不行，我的钱包在颤抖！我的零花钱在哀嚎。我要和自己的本能战斗对抗一下……
t_en: Ahh~ this is not good. My wallet is trembling! My pocket money is crying out in pain. I need to battle against my own instincts for a bit...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你先去周围逛逛吧，等我战斗结束了就来找你，不要跑太远哦。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, go look around without me for awhile. I'll come find you once I'm done with this battle. Just don't wander too far, okay?

t_ch: 你说，星穹列车的人，真的能给二相乐园带来幸福吗？
t_en: Do you think the people from the Astral Express can really bring happiness to Planarcadia?

t_ch: 他们…只是来度假的。
t_en: They're... just here on vacation.

t_ch: 既然只是来度假的，又为什么要闯入这个世界神圣的仪式呢？他们真的尊重过这个世界的人怎么想吗？
t_en: If they're just here on vacation, why did they go barging into our world's sacred ceremony? Did they ever stop to think about how the people of this world would feel about that?

t_ch: 会吧…
t_en: I guess...

t_ch: 他们不是拯救过许多危机吗？如果，二相乐园发生了危机，他们会尽全力保护这个世界的。
t_en: Haven't they resolved countless crises before? If Planarcadia is ever in grave danger, they would do everything in their power to protect this world.

t_ch: 那和救火队又有什么区别？我说的是，给二相乐园长久的幸福——他们能做到吗？
t_en: How's that any different from a fire brigade? What I mean is, can they really bring lasting happiness to Planarcadia?

t_ch: 做不到吧…
t_en: I guess they can't...

t_ch: 我想也是。
t_en: I thought so too.

t_ch: 能给这个世界带来幸福的，只有幸研会。
t_en: Only the Smiles Society can bring happiness to this world.

t_ch: 哔哔，发现垃圾，执行清扫指令。
t_en: Beep beep, trash detected, initiating cleaning protocol.

t_ch: 这又是什么帕姆？
t_en: What's up with this Pom-Pom?

t_ch: 你们把列车长开发成什么了…
t_en: What in the world did you guys turn the conductor into...

t_ch: 这是珠星造「净」字新型号保洁卫生合金帕姆机铠，简称「保姆」。其实咱们珠星的技术人员还有个开发代号……
t_en: This is Pearluxe's new "Clean" series sanitation alloy Pom-Pom mechatron, or "Pommy" for short. Actually, our tech team had another codename for it...

t_ch: 他们叫它「苦力帕」。您要不要预购一台？
t_en: They call it "Mop-Pom." Would you like to pre-order one?

t_ch: （有点心动，要不要买一台回去减轻列车长的工作强度？）
t_en: (I'm kinda tempted. Should I get one to help lighten our conductor's workload?)

t_ch: 珠星造「净」字新型号保洁卫生合金帕姆机铠，简称「保姆」转向你，似乎在评估你的体积、分析你的化学构成。
t_en: This is Pearluxe's new "Clean" series sanitation alloy Pom-Pom mechatron, or "Pommy" for short. Actually, our tech team had another codename for it...

t_ch: 哔哔，发现攻击性不可燃垃圾，执行清扫指令。
t_en: Beep beep, aggressive non-flammable trash detected, initiating cleaning protocol.

t_ch: 对不起，手滑了！
t_en: Oops, my hand slipped!

t_ch: 你才是不可燃垃圾！
t_en: YOU'RE the non-flammable trash!

t_ch: 糟了，下手是不是太重了。
t_en: Oh no, did I go too hard on it?

t_ch: （展会似乎还没正式开始剪票，先在这儿逛逛吧。）
t_en: (Looks like they haven't started checking tickets for the exhibition yet. Let's just hang around here for a bit.)

t_ch: 你好，{NICKNAME}！打扰了！我们是满愿电视台的！真幸运能在这儿碰到您！您现在有空吗？
t_en: Hi, {NICKNAME}! Sorry to bother you! We're with Fulwish TV! It's our lucky day running into you here! Do you have a moment?

t_ch: 就一小会儿，接受一下我们简短的采访？
t_en: Mind doing a short interview with us? It won't take long.

t_ch: 观众们对您这位新晋的谒者、还有星穹列车的冒险故事，可都好奇得不得了呢！
t_en: Our audience is absolutely dying to hear about the new Supplicant in town and your adventures aboard the Astral Express!

t_ch: 可以的。
t_en: Sure thing.

t_ch: 简短点，我稍后还有安排。
t_en: Keep it brief, I've got plans later.

t_ch: 没问题，不过我们的采访最好简短些，因为主办方可能对我们还有安排。
t_en: No problem, but let's keep the interview brief, since the organizers might have other plans for us.

t_ch: 第一个问题：作为列车重新启程的站点，我想先请您谈谈自己对二相乐园的感想。
t_en: First question: Seeing as Planarcadia was the starting point of the Express's new voyage, how would you describe your impressions of this place?

t_ch: 谈谈悠久历史。
t_en: Talk about its long history.

t_ch: 谈谈新潮文化。
t_en: Talk about its modern culture.

t_ch: 二相乐园…确实让我印象深刻。一个古老的世界，又显得如此新潮…五光十色。
t_en: Planarcadia... has left quite an impression on me. An ancient world that somehow feels so modern... so vibrant and colorful.

t_ch: 人人都在追逐热点，寻找乐子…我觉得，这里更像是一个永不落幕的狂欢节。
t_en: Everyone's chasing the latest trends, looking for fun... I'd say this place is more like a never-ending carnival.

t_ch: 有意思。幻月游戏的历史上，像您这样知名的银河大人物参与可是极其罕见的事。作为星穹列车的谒者，您在这场「游戏」中想要为这个世界带来怎样的改变？
t_en: Interesting. Throughout the history of the Phantasmoon Games, it's been extremely rare to have such a renowned cosmic figure as yourself participating. As the Astral Express's Supplicant, what kind of changes do you hope to bring to this world in these Games?

t_ch: 我可没这么傲慢。
t_en: I'm not that arrogant.

t_ch: 我哪有资格改变这里？
t_en: Who am I to change anything here?

t_ch: 我只是一个过客啊，哪儿有资格去改变这个世界？
t_en: I'm just a passerby. Who am I to change this world?

t_ch: 但如果可以的话，我希望向大家展示「开拓」所代表的精神力量。
t_en: But if I can, I hope to show everyone the spiritual strength of what the Trailblaze represents.

t_ch: 令人印象深刻的回答！说到这个，您加入游戏后率先击败了代表假面愚者的火花小姐。对于未来可能面临的本土谒者的挑战，您作何感想？
t_en: That's an impressive answer! Speaking of which, after joining the games, you immediately went to defeat Miss Sparxie, who represented the Masked Fools. What are your thoughts on potentially facing native Supplicants in the future?

t_ch: 我只想阻止火花。
t_en: I just wanted to stop Sparxie, and that's it.

t_ch: 我不想和本土谒者为敌。
t_en: I don't want to be enemies with the native Supplicants.

t_ch: 火花通过混乱和疯狂找乐子，这种失控的「欢愉」太危险了。
t_en: Sparxie gets her kicks through chaos and madness. That kind of out-of-control Elation is way too dangerous.

t_ch: 至于其他的本土谒者，只要他们不会让游戏变得危险…我更愿意合作，而不是靠暴力打败他们。
t_en: As for the other native Supplicants, as long as they don't make the games dangerous... I'd rather cooperate with them than defeat them through violence.

t_ch: 说起本土的谒者，我们注意到「星铁FES」是由珠星财团为列车举办的欢迎仪式。有传言说公司也是列车的资助者，请问您这一次参与「游戏」代表的究竟是列车还是公司？
t_en: Speaking of local Supplicants, we've noticed that "Star Rail FEST" is Pearluxe Corp's way of rolling out the red carpet for the Express. There are rumors that the IPC is also sponsoring the Express. So, I have to ask: Are you representing the Express or the IPC in these Games?

t_ch: 撇清关系。
t_en: Set the record straight.

t_ch: 我只是受邀出席。
t_en: I'm just attending because I was invited.

t_ch: 公司的利益？怎么可能！虽然星铁FES的规模也远超我的预期，真珠女士和珠星盛情邀请，我也心怀感激……
t_en: The IPC's interests? Nah. Even though Star Rail FEST has exceeded my expectations, and Madam Pearl and Pearluxe extended such a warm invitation, which I'm truly grateful for...

t_ch: 但说到底，这是属于所有人的嘉年华，我只是其中一个宾客，不是这里的主人。
t_en: At the end of the day, this is a festival for everyone, and I'm just one of the guests. I'm not the master of this place.

t_ch: 不愧是媒体…这几个尖锐的问题让你不免汗流浃背。你几乎把这辈子所能打的一切官腔都给透支了。
t_en: It's the media alright... Those hard-hitting questions had you sweating bullets. You burned through every ounce of corporate speak you'll ever have in this lifetime.

t_ch: 你每一个微表情都在向外呐喊：快点结束这场采访吧！
t_en: Every micro-expression on your face is screaming: End this interview already!

t_ch: 谢谢您宝贵的时间，接下来，咱们就不耽误您在展会现场的安排了。
t_en: Thank you for your valuable time. We won't keep you from your plans at the exhibition any longer.

t_ch: 又见面了，{NICKNAME}。你运气真好，居然没被粉丝团团围住淹没。
t_en: Nice to see you again, {NICKNAME}. You're lucky you haven't been completely swarmed by fans yet.

t_ch: 绒绒号的主角原型水灵灵地在此，大家却认不出来，真是个超大冷笑话。该不会他们把你当成某个Coser了？你别说，很有可能。
t_en: Here you are, the original inspiration for The Fluffy's main character, fresh as a daisy, yet no one recognizes you. Talk about irony! Don't tell me they think you're just some cosplayers? Come to think of it, that's actually quite possible.

t_ch: 你怎么没被围住？
t_en: How come you're not being swarmed by fans?

t_ch: 毕竟没有哪个读者见过我本人的真容嘛。但是！等签售开始就不同了。
t_en: Well, none of my readers have seen my real face yet. But that's all gonna change once the book signing starts.

t_ch: 模糊二维马老师，你来了。
t_en: Blurry_QR_Colt, you're here!

t_ch: 嘘！声音再低一点。我怕被狂热粉丝们淹没！
t_en: Shh! Keep your voice down. I'm afraid of being swarmed by rabid fans!

t_ch: 说起来真是令人伤心，主办方居然只给我安排了一个不着调的小摊位。我还以为会有主席台之类的显眼地方坐坐呢。
t_en: It's honestly heartbreaking that the organizers only gave me this dinky little booth. I was hoping for something more prominent, like a spot on the main stage or something.

t_ch: 这是星铁FES…
t_en: This is Star Rail FEST...

t_ch: 这不是绒绒号FES…
t_en: This isn't The Fluffy FEST...

t_ch: 我知道。对了，要不要收下今天模糊二维马老师签售的第<unbreak>000000001</unbreak>号漫画珍藏本？
t_en: I know. Hey, wanna have the #000000001 collector's edition comic that Blurry_QR_Colt signed today?

t_ch: 好啊，免费吗？
t_en: Sure, mind telling me if it's free?

t_ch: 说话生分了不是…当然是免费的咯！但你懂，免费的才是最贵的嘛~
t_en: Whoa, since when did we get all polite... Of course it's free! But you know what they say, nothing's more expensive than free stuff~

t_ch: 听起来也没法拒绝吧？
t_en: Hard to say no to that, right?

t_ch: 没错，这么有纪念价值的东西，不可以拒绝！
t_en: Exactly, something this memorable can hardly be refused!

t_ch: 这个序列号太夸张了吧…
t_en: This serial number seems a bit much...

t_ch: 知道什么叫美好的祝愿吗…卖得多有什么不好啊，也有你一份版税呢。
t_en: Ever heard of "wishful thinking"...? Besides, what's wrong with selling a ton of copies? You're getting royalties too, you know.

t_ch: 等等，这附赠的是啥？
t_en: Hold up, what's this extra thing?

t_ch: 应援棒。主办方给了我几千根，让我每签售一本就给粉丝发上一根。
t_en: Light sticks. The organizers gave me thousands of them and told me to hand one out to each fan who gets a book signed.

t_ch: 他们真的好会差使人。我本想说，难道我不是举世闻名的《苍天航路绒绒号》的作者模糊二维马大人吗？你们把姐姐我当成什么了？
t_en: They really know how to push someone around. I wanted to give them a piece of my mind! Am I not the world-renowned author of Fluffy Across the Blue, the great Blurry_QR_Colt? Who exactly do they think I am, chopped liver?

t_ch: 但你说的对，这是「星铁FES」…今天的我只是个配角。
t_en: But you're right, this is Star Rail FEST... Today I'm just a side character.

t_ch: 算算时间，该去摊位上和工作人员开始签售了。我不耽误你玩了，拜拜。
t_en: Anyway, it's about time to head to the booth and meet up with the staff to start the signing session. I won't keep you from enjoying yourself any longer. Bye-bye!

t_ch: （绯英？她怎么在这儿？）
t_en: (Evanescia? What is she doing here?)

t_ch: 啊啊，真对不起！你…不要紧吧？
t_en: Ah, I'm so sorry! Are you... alright?

t_ch: 你是属炮弹的吗？
t_en: What are you, a cannonball or something?

t_ch: 对、对不起…我真的不知道自己全力冲刺时会有这么大的力气。
t_en: S-Sorry... I had no idea I could pack such a punch when sprinting at full speed.

t_ch: 得亏我的身体还算结实。
t_en: Good thing I'm built tough.

t_ch: 绯英，你真是英魂不散啊。
t_en: Evanescia, you just won't stop haunting me, huh?

t_ch: 本来只是想模仿一下「和叼着面包的女高中生在路上相撞」的漫画桥段的……
t_en: I just wanted to recreate that classic teen rom-com moment. You know, "bumping into a schoolgirl running late with toast in her mouth"...

t_ch: 真的很抱歉！
t_en: I'm really sorry!

t_ch: 你为什么在这儿？
t_en: Why are you here?

t_ch: 我为什么在这儿？大概是因为…剧情需要吧！
t_en: Why am I here? Well, probably because... the plot demands it!

t_ch: 你找借口的水平未免也太烂了吧！
t_en: That's got to be the lamest excuse I've ever heard!

t_ch: 这都多少年前的老梗了…
t_en: That trope is so outdated...

t_ch: 这么经典的桥段这么快就不流行了吗！唉……
t_en: How could such a classic trope fall out of fashion so quickly!?

t_ch: 你接近我到底有什么目的？
t_en: What's your real motive for getting close to me?

t_ch: 喂喂，幻月游戏里好歹是我帮了你一把唉，拿看反派的眼神瞪我，这样好吗？
t_en: Hey hey, I helped you out during the Phantasmoon Games, didn't I? Is it really fair to glare at me like I'm some kind of villain?

t_ch: 你突然意识到，正是眼前的少女给了你在第一场谒者之战中翻盘的机会。无论她为何接近你，至少她应该对你没有恶意。
t_en: It suddenly hits you... This girl in front of you is the one who gave you the chance to turn the tables in your first battle of the Supplicants. Whatever her reasons for approaching you, she clearly doesn't mean you any harm.

t_ch: 谢谢你的面具。
t_en: Thanks for the mask.

t_ch: 嘿嘿，我可是全程观赏了你在绘世学院的战斗。
t_en: Hehe, I watched your whole fight at Graphia Academy.

t_ch: 对于那些有缘来到这场游戏中的人，只要他们能展露出自己的「愿」，我当然愿意结一份善缘啦。
t_en: I'm more than happy to befriend those who are destined to be part of these games, as long as they can show me their "wish."

t_ch: 你不是来收回面具的吧？
t_en: You're not here to take back the mask, are you?

t_ch: 怎么会，这副面具已经烙印上你灵魂的形状了。我要回来也没什么用啦。
t_en: Of course not! That mask has already been imprinted with the shape of your soul. Even if I took it back, it wouldn't be of any use to me.

t_ch: 你为什么能画出面具？
t_en: How were you able to draw the mask?

t_ch: 曾经有个老朋友教过我画画，而我恰好又很有天分。
t_en: An old friend of mine once taught me how to draw. And as it turns out, I'm a natural.

t_ch: 就你那画面具时的那几笔鬼涂鸦……
t_en: If you call those {F#bad}{M#lousy} doodles you made when drawing the mask "talent"...

t_ch: 我一直在想，自己幻造出来的东西到底能不能骗过幻月的眼睛？
t_en: I'd always wondered if something I imagenated could actually fool the Phantasmoon's eyes.

t_ch: 你看，我送给你的这张「临时门票」大有可为，这证明我的画技又精进一筹啦。
t_en: See? This "temporary ticket" I gave you shows great promise, proof that my artistic skills have leveled up!

t_ch: 话说到这，你是不是应该…报答我一下？
t_en: Speaking of which, shouldn't you... show me some gratitude?

t_ch: 你想要什么？
t_en: What do you want?

t_ch: 先说好，我没钱。
t_en: Just so we're clear, I'm completely broke.

t_ch: 饶了我吧，我没有灵魂。
t_en: Have mercy. I've got no soul to spare.

t_ch: 从来只听说过狐狸报恩…
t_en: I've only ever heard of foxes returning favors...

t_ch: 黄牛太猖狂了，我没抢到展会的门票…你能带我进去吗？
t_en: The scalpers are completely out of control! I couldn't snag a single ticket to the exhibition... Could you sneak me in?

t_ch: 此刻，有两个声音出现在你的耳朵两侧。它们对你说——
t_en: At this very moment, two voices appear on either side of you. They tell you—

t_ch: （她确实有恩于咱们，但堂堂无名客，怎么能做帮人逃票这种不道德的事？）
t_en: (She did help us out before, but as a dignified Nameless, how could I do something as unethical as helping someone sneak in without a ticket?)

t_ch: （吃人嘴软，拿人手短，就这么点小忙都不帮？再说了，咱们过去是这么有道德的人吗？我怎么不记得？）
t_en: (After all she's done for us, you're gonna be stingy about a tiny favor? Besides, since when were we such paragons of virtue? I sure don't remember any of that!)

t_ch: 我考虑考虑。
t_en: I'll think about it.

t_ch: 啊？居然还挺有原则，看来得用这招——
t_en: Huh? Didn't expect you to be so principled... Guess I'll have to use this trick...

t_ch: 小浣熊，其实我一直是你的粉丝，从绒绒号第一卷第一话第一页开始，我就已经被你深深地吸引。
t_en: Little raccoon, I've actually been a huge fan of yours all along. From the very first page of The Fluffy, Volume 1, Chapter 1, I was already captivated by you.

t_ch: 那天下午，当我从绘世学院的教学楼下路过，瞥见窗边的你。我就知道，我的心已经被你夺走，此生再不会有悲喜。
t_en: That afternoon, as I passed by the Graphia Academy building, I caught a glimpse of you by the window. Right then, I knew my heart had been stolen and nothing else would ever make me feel so alive again.

t_ch: 能和你在展会里经历一段快乐的时光，这就是我今生最大的愿望。
t_en: Getting to share a few happy moments with you at this exhibition... That's all I could ever ask for in this lifetime.

t_ch: 好了，别说了，我怕。
t_en: Okay, stop it, you're scaring me.

t_ch: 先说好，被抓了别供出我。
t_en: Let's just get one thing straight: Don't rat me out if you get caught.

t_ch: 别再念了，我答应还不行吗！
t_en: Alright, alright, I'll do it! Stop nagging already!

t_ch: 哼哼，果然无论是谁对赞美自己的彩虹屁都无力抵抗！
t_en: Hehehe, just as I thought. No one's immune to some good old-fashioned glazing!

t_ch: 走吧，耽误了不少时间，我得先和朋友会合。
t_en: Let's go. We've wasted enough time. I need to meet up with my friends first.

t_ch: 唉！{NICKNAME}，我最后还是没管住自己的钱包！
t_en: Ugh! {NICKNAME}, I tried, but I still just couldn't keep my wallet shut!

t_ch: 等等，你背后的这个小姐姐看起来有点眼熟，我们是不是在哪儿见过？
t_en: Wait, that girl behind you looks kinda familiar. Have we met somewhere before?

t_ch: 这个搭讪手法，很拙劣。
t_en: That's a pretty lame pickup line.

t_ch: 你在胡言乱语说什么啊？我真的见过她…好像，就在绘世学院里？
t_en: What are you talking about? I've definitely seen her... I think it was at Graphia Academy?

t_ch: 这是我的粉毛背后灵。
t_en: This is my pink-haired spirit sidekick.

t_ch: 总感觉你在暗戳戳地骂我…我真的见过她…好像，就在绘世学院里？
t_en: I feel like you're throwing shade at me... Anyway, I've definitely seen her... I think it was at Graphia Academy?

t_ch: 算了，不重要了。
t_en: Whatever, it's not important.

t_ch: 仔细一看，这不是绒绒号里的「三月兔」吗？还原度好高啊喂，尤其是这对耳朵。
t_en: Wait a sec, isn't this March Bunny from The Fluffy? The attention to detail is insane, especially those ears!

t_ch: …是狐狸，是狐狸啦！
t_en: ...I'm a fox, a fox!

t_ch: 自我介绍一下，我叫绯英，一个普通的绒绒号粉丝。啊啊你一定就是三月兔的原型吧？真人比新闻里还漂亮好几倍呢。
t_en: Let me introduce myself. I'm Evanescia, just a normal fan of The Fluffy. Ah, you must be the inspiration for March Bunny! You're way prettier in person than in the news!

t_ch: 三月兔，其实我一直是你的粉丝，从第一卷第一话第一页开始，我就已经被你深深地吸引。
t_en: March Bunny, I've actually been a huge fan of yours all along. From the very first page of Volume 1, Chapter 1, I was already captivated by you.

t_ch: 能和你在展会里经历一段快乐的时光，这就是我今生最大的愿望。可我连一张展会的票都买不到，只能站在这里遥望台阶上的世界。
t_en: Getting to share a few happy moments with you at this exhibition... That's all I could ever ask for in this lifetime. But I can't even get a single ticket, so I can only stand here gazing up at that world from afar.

t_ch: 你的台词查重率太高了。
t_en: Hey, are you recycling your lines?

t_ch: 呵，天呐，绒绒号领域大神。
t_en: Oh my goodness, a legendary expert on The Fluffy.

t_ch: 呜呜呜，小可怜，你就放心吧，姐姐一定帮你实现愿望。
t_en: Aww, you poor thing, don't you worry! I will definitely make your wish come true.

t_ch: 三月，她都是现编的！
t_en: March, she's making it all up!

t_ch: 三月，你可不要被这么成熟的小妹妹给骗了啊！
t_en: March, don't let yourself be fooled by such a seasoned swindler!

t_ch: 怎么就突然结为姐妹了！
t_en: You've just met, and you're besties already!?

t_ch: {F#你要不要加入啊？}{M#这是突然间福至心灵的情谊，你不懂！}
t_en: {F#Wanna join us?}{M#It's like our souls just clicked on a cosmic level! You wouldn't get it!}

t_ch: 这么可爱的狐狸小妹妹，她能有什么坏心思？总不会像幻胧那样吧？再说这儿又没有星核和建木。
t_en: Such an adorable little fox girl could never have any bad intentions. It's not like she's another Phantylia, right? Besides, this place doesn't even have any Stellaron or Ambrosial Arbor.

t_ch: 英子你放心，包在我身上！
t_en: Don't worry, Nescia! Just leave it to me!

t_ch: 太好了，谢谢三月姐姐！
t_en: That's great! Thank you so much, Miss March!

t_ch: 啊，姬子姐给我发消息，时候差不多了，咱们该进场了。
t_en: Ah, Himeko just messaged me. It's about time to head in now.

t_ch: 哇，这不是{NICKNAME}和三月七吗？还原度好高啊。在这么多装成无名客逃票的人里，你们绝对是最像的！
t_en: Wow, if it isn't {NICKNAME} and March 7th! Such incredible cosplay accuracy. Out of all the people trying to sneak in disguised as the Nameless, you two are definitely the most convincing!

t_ch: 你有没有考虑过一种可能，{F#她们}{M#他们}就是本人？贵客还要检票，这成什么体统。
t_en: Have you considered the possibility that they might be the real deal? And how inappropriate it is to ask our distinguished guests for tickets?

t_ch: 你们好啊，又见面了。总部安排我在这儿等候迎接各位。姬子女士已经入场了。{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}、三月七小姐，还有这位是……？
t_en: Hello there, we meet again! HQ arranged for me to wait here and welcome all of you. Miss Himeko has already entered the venue. {M#Mr.}{F#Miss.} {NICKNAME}, Miss March 7th, and this is...?

t_ch: 啊，她是……
t_en: Ah, she's...

t_ch: 是我们的朋友。
t_en: She's our friend.

t_ch: 你好，我叫绯英，是{NICKNAME}的好朋友。
t_en: Hi, I'm Evanescia, {NICKNAME}'s good friend.

t_ch: 列车新增随宠。
t_en: Our new pet aboard the Express.

t_ch: 你好，我叫绯英，是星穹列车的新增随宠。
t_en: Hi, I'm Evanescia, the new pet aboard the Astral Express.

t_ch: 她开玩笑呢，这位是我们俩的好朋友。
t_en: She's just kidding. This is our good friend.

t_ch: 你说什么呀？这里就我俩。
t_en: What are you talking about? It's just the two of us here.

t_ch: 你好，我叫绯英，是星穹列车的英灵。
t_en: Hi there! I'm Evanescia, the evanescent spirit of the Astral Express.

t_ch: 哎？！你能看见她的对吧？
t_en: Huh!? You can see her too, right?

t_ch: {F#她们}{M#他们}跟你们开玩笑呢！这位是我和{NICKNAME}的朋友，能否通融一下……
t_en: They're just messing with you! She is a friend of ours. Is it possible for you to make an exception just this once...

t_ch: 呵呵，您几位真是太幽默了。
t_en: Heh, you folks sure have a great sense of humor.

t_ch: 既然是各位的朋友，没关系，请进吧！
t_en: Since you're friends with our guests here, I guess it's all good. Come on in!

t_ch: 各位游客、各位观众你们好！本次「星铁FES」展会正式揭幕之前，请允许我感谢主办方珠星娱乐，同时也感谢噗噜兴业、速建重工、以及满愿电视台的协力支持。
t_en: Hello, dear visitors and spectators! Before we officially kick off the "Star Rail FEST" exhibition, I'd like to thank our host, Pearluxe Entertainment, as well as extend our gratitude to Ploo Industries, Turbogen Heavy Industries, and Fulwish TV for their collaborative support.

t_ch: 现已开放的展区，将为您沉浸式重现星穹列车穿梭星海的奇妙冒险之旅！如今各位正身处——贝洛伯格！
t_en: The exhibition areas now open will transport you straight into the Astral Express's incredible journey across the sea of stars! And right now, ladies and gentlemen, you're standing in none other than... Belobog!

t_ch: 现在，让我们高声呼唤，来自冰雪的英雄之名吧！
t_en: Now, let me hear you call out the name of our hero from the ice and snow!

t_ch: 加油啊！加油啊！可可利亚大人加油啊！
t_en: Come on! Come on! You've got this, Madam Cocolia!

t_ch: 长大了，我要做大守护者，变成冰霜巨人和暴走的超古代兵器战斗！
t_en: When I grow up, I wanna be the Supreme Guardian and turn into a Frost Giant to fight those rampaging Super Ancient Weapons!

t_ch: 下辈子，我要做大守护者，变成魔法少女保护二相乐园。
t_en: In my next life, I wanna be the Supreme Guardian and turn into a magical girl to protect Planarcadia.

t_ch: 这不对吧，为什么大家都在支持…可可利亚？
t_en: Wait, this isn't right... Why is everyone supporting... Cocolia?

t_ch: 为什么主持人是火花啊！
t_en: Why is Sparxie the host!?

t_ch: 流量最大的美少女主播，被请来参加流量最大的活动，有什么问题？
t_en: What's wrong with having the most popular streamer girl host the biggest event?

t_ch: 你你你、你不是应该正在被「异常防御部」通缉中吗？
t_en: W—W—Wait, aren't you supposed to be on the Department of Aberration Defense's wanted list?

t_ch: 没错呀…所以打完这份工我就得立刻潜逃了。说起来，也许该用花火的身份躲一阵。毕竟，他们要抓的是「火花」，和我「花火」又有什么关系？
t_en: That's right... So I'll have to go into hiding right after this job. Come to think of it, maybe I should lie low using my Sparkle identity. After all, what does Sparkle have to do with this Sparxie they're after?

t_ch: 对了，无名客，你要不可怜可怜我，把面具还我……
t_en: Oh right, Nameless, won't you take pity on me and give me back my mask...

t_ch: 做梦吧你！
t_en: In your dreams!

t_ch: 哟吼，既然两位星穹列车的无名客来到了现场，那就让我们展开一场紧张刺激的绒绒号知识问答环节！
t_en: Yoohoo! Since we have two Nameless from the Astral Express here with us today, let's kick off an exciting The Fluffy trivia quiz!

t_ch: 其实，我没看过漫画…
t_en: Actually, I've never read the comics...

t_ch: 我还没来得及预习…
t_en: I haven't had a chance to study up yet...

t_ch: 火花的攻击又要来了吗？
t_en: Is Sparxie going to strike again?

t_ch: 请听题——在绒绒号贝洛伯格卷最终话，「大守护者的纽带」中，可可利亚召唤了什么与她并肩作战？
t_en: Here's your question: In the final chapter of The Fluffy's Belobog arc, "The Supreme Guardian's Bond," what did Cocolia summon to fight by her side?

t_ch: 能变身冰之巨人的守护者魔棒！
t_en: The Guardian Wand that could transform her into an Ice Giant!

t_ch: 叮咚，回答正确。
t_en: Ding ding, that's correct!

t_ch: 看得出来，这位小妹妹是绒绒号的忠实读者啊，竟然比两位无名客答得都快！
t_en: Well, well, looks like this young lady here is quite the devoted reader of The Fluffy, answering even faster than the Nameless!

t_ch: 不是造物引擎？
t_en: Shouldn't it be the Engine of Creation?

t_ch: 对哦，我都快忘记最初唤醒造物引擎的是她了。
t_en: Oh right, I almost forgot she was the one who first awakened the Engine of Creation.

t_ch: 明明是无尽寒冬之槊。
t_en: It was clearly the Lance of the Eternal Freeze.

t_ch: 那俩大冰碴子，确实让人印象深刻。
t_en: Those two huge chunks of ice were definitely quite impressive.

t_ch: 你怎么还抢答了？
t_en: Hey, why are you stealing my thunder?

t_ch: 我可是绒绒号的死忠读者啊！
t_en: I'm a die-hard fan of The Fluffy, you know!

t_ch: 而且冰之巨人是怎么回事？可可利亚虽然会变身，但也不至于大到和造物引擎一个量级。
t_en: And what's the deal with this Ice Giant? Sure, Cocolia can transform, but she shouldn't be anywhere near the size of the Engine of Creation!

t_ch: 什么，可可利亚女士以人类之躯和造物引擎作战？那不是…更炫酷了嘛！呃，可是漫画里没画这段啊！
t_en: What? Lady Cocolia fought the Engine of Creation in her human form? That... That just makes it even more awesome! Ugh, but they didn't show that part in the comic!

t_ch: 请听下一题，在可可利亚被冰封前，她把什么交给了球棒浣熊？
t_en: Next question: Before Cocolia was frozen in ice, what did she give to Baseball Raccoon?

t_ch: 什么都没给。
t_en: Nothing at all.

t_ch: 满满的伤害。
t_en: Nothing but pure damage.

t_ch: 呃，发自内心的鼓励？
t_en: Uh, heartfelt encouragement?

t_ch: 咘咘，回答错误。
t_en: Oops, wrong answer.

t_ch: 是炎枪！最后，小浣熊也是靠着这把炎枪把所有人的光传给可可利亚，让她重获力量，以野火形态降临。
t_en: The flaming lance! In the end, the little raccoon used that lance to channel everyone's light to Cocolia, restoring her power so she could descend in her Wildfire form!

t_ch: 叮咚，回答正确。
t_en: Ding ding, that's correct!

t_ch: 呜…每次翻到那页，我都会忍不住泪流满面。
t_en: ... Every time I turn to that page, I can't help but burst into tears.

t_ch: 这剧情太倒反天罡了…
t_en: This plot has gone completely off the rails...

t_ch: 我怎么成可可利亚徒弟了？
t_en: How did I end up becoming Cocolia's disciple?

t_ch: 其实，这把炎枪是我被捅了个透心凉的时候，从过去的大守护者那里继承的。
t_en: Actually, I inherited this flaming lance from the previous Supreme Guardians when I got stabbed right through the heart.

t_ch: 你在说什么啊，{NICKNAME}……
t_en: What are you talking about, {NICKNAME}...

t_ch: 贝洛伯格的最后一战，难道不是——大守护者尽管身受重伤，但为了雪国的子民，她毅然化身为冰霜巨人，同无名客一起反击即将夷平贝洛伯格的「毁灭引擎」！
t_en: In Belobog's final battle, wasn't it like this: Despite her grievous wounds, the Supreme Guardian transformed herself into a Frost Giant for the sake of the people of the winter-lands, joining forces with the Nameless to counter the Destruction Engine that was about to flatten Belobog!
Uhh...

t_ch: 原来，绒绒号的剧情采纳的是贝洛伯格官方口径。
t_en: So, The Fluffy's storyline follows the official Belobogian narrative.

t_ch: 难道…事情不是这样的吗？哎，能不能透露一点儿，就一点儿？
t_en: Wait... is that not how things went? Could you at least spill a little? Just a little?

t_ch: 其实，可可利亚被蛊惑了…
t_en: Actually, Cocolia was bewitched...

t_ch: 抱歉，我不能说太多。
t_en: Sorry, I can't say too much.

t_ch: 啊，我明白了！如果官方口径是可可利亚和无名客们一同战胜了暴走的引擎……
t_en: Ah, I get it! If the official version of events is that Cocolia and the Nameless defeated the rampaging Engine together...

t_ch: 那也就意味着，反过来，可可利亚是你们打倒的敌人？
t_en: Then that means, in reverse, Cocolia was the enemy you defeated?

t_ch: …原来如此。如果向贝洛伯格的人民揭露真相，好不容易得来的和平也就没法守住了，对吧？
t_en: ...I see. If the truth about this were to be revealed to the people of Belobog, the hard-earned peace would crumble, wouldn't it?

t_ch: …英子，还请你保守秘密！
t_en: ...Nescia, please keep this a secret!

t_ch: 嗯嗯，我会给嘴巴上拉链的啦。
t_en: Of course, my lips are sealed!

t_ch: 不过倒是出乎我的意料，星穹列车的英雄也是会说谎的。
t_en: But I have to say, I'm surprised that even the heroes of the Astral Express can tell lies.

t_ch: 抱歉，这很幻灭吧？
t_en: Sorry about that. Pretty disenchanting, isn't it?

t_ch: 倒也没有啦。
t_en: Not really.

t_ch: 我希望这个谎言能撑久一点。
t_en: I hope this lie can hold up a bit longer.

t_ch: 都说谎言不会长久，贝洛伯格的未来虽然建立在了谎言上，但我更希望它能长长久久地持续下去。
t_en: They say lies don't last forever, and while Belobog's future may be built on a lie, I hope it can endure for a long, long time.

t_ch: 因为那些人都是我的朋友。
t_en: Because those people are all my friends.

t_ch: 谢谢你们能跟我说这个。
t_en: Thank you for telling me about this.

t_ch: 虽然幻月游戏要求谒者们戴上面具，但在我眼里，它反而是让人们直面内心的过程呢。
t_en: The Phantasmoon Games make Supplicants wear masks, but if you ask me? That's when people really drop the act and face their true selves.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，活动还没结束哟！请跟我到平台上来，为可可利亚大人和毁灭引擎的大战送出你的关键一击！
t_en: {NICKNAME}, the event's not over yet! Come join me on the stage and deliver your decisive strike in the epic battle between Madam Cocolia and the Destruction Engine!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，快看，这不是，希露瓦小姐吗？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, look! Isn't that Miss Serval?

t_ch: 你怎么来了？
t_en: What brings you here?

t_ch: 贝城的大家都来了啊。
t_en: Even our friends from Belobog made it here!

t_ch: 托帕小姐向贝洛伯格发出了邀请，希望我们能拜访二相乐园，洽谈一个文化交流项目。
t_en: Miss Topaz extended an invitation to Belobog, hoping we could visit Planarcadia to discuss a cultural exchange program.

t_ch: 我心说，该不会是又托了星穹列车的福吧？现在看来，果然是这样的。
t_en: I couldn't help but wonder if this was another blessing from the Astral Express... And sure enough, that's exactly what it was.

t_ch: 贝洛伯格的一切还好吗？
t_en: How's everything in Belobog?

t_ch: 好！当然好！冰雪消融的速度比想的要快多了。听玲宝说，有更多冰封的城市正在逐渐被发掘出来。这一切都多亏了你们啊。
t_en: Great! Everything's great! The ice is melting way faster than we expected. Lynxy told me that more frozen cities are gradually being uncovered. And it's all thanks to you guys!

t_ch: 文化交流项目？
t_en: A cultural exchange program?

t_ch: 对其他人来说，文化交流是展示来自雅利洛的产品；对我来说，是摇滚。
t_en: For other people, cultural exchange means showcasing products from Jarilo, whereas for me, it's all about rock 'n' roll.

t_ch: 这儿比我想的还要繁荣许多，这儿的摇滚音乐也给了我很多的创作灵感！
t_en: This place is way livelier than I imagined, and the rock music here has given me so much creative inspiration!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，多亏了你们当初点燃了那束光。现在，轮到我们把这份光，用贝洛伯格的方式传递出去啦！比如，用震撼全场的摇滚！
t_en: {NICKNAME}, it's all thanks to you guys for lighting that spark back then. Now, it's our turn to carry the torch forward, Belobog style! Like, with some mind-blowing rock 'n' roll!

t_ch: 对了，我听主持人说，他们在那个平台上为你准备了一些惊喜呢。快去看看吧！
t_en: Oh right, I heard from the host that they prepared some surprises for you on that platform. Go check it out!

t_ch: 你们应该挺忙的吧！毕竟一整个展会都是为星穹列车举行的，我不耽误你们的行程了，有空聊。
t_en: You must be pretty busy! After all, a whole exhibition is being held for the Astral Express. I won't take up more of your time. Let's chat later when you're free.

t_ch: 可可利亚大人正在陷入危机，加油啊，可可利亚大人！
t_en: Madam Cocolia is in crisis! Hang in there, Madam Cocolia!

t_ch: 不要害怕，诸位！我已经看到了英雄到来的身影！
t_en: Fear not, everyone! I can see our hero approaching!

t_ch: 今天我们很荣幸地邀请到了星穹列车的英雄，贝洛伯格之战的亲历者{NICKNAME}出席「星铁FES」！
t_en: Today, we are honored to welcome to Star Rail FEST the hero of the Astral Express, one who survived the Battle of Belobog, {NICKNAME}!

t_ch: 让我们高声呼喊「存护」意志继承者的名字！
t_en: Let me hear you say the name of the will of Preservation's successor!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}！{NICKNAME}！{NICKNAME}！——
t_en: {NICKNAME}! {NICKNAME}! {NICKNAME}!

t_ch: 来吧，天外的战士！请为我们重演名场面！
t_en: Come on, warrior from beyond the sky! Show us that legendary scene again!

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>点燃炎枪，为可可利亚大人充能助战</color>，让她听到我们的呼唤！
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Ignite your flaming lance, charge up Madam Cocolia with your power</color>, and let her hear our calls!

t_ch: 主持人叫你了，该你上场咯，大英雄。
t_en: The host is calling for you. Time to take the stage, great hero.

t_ch: 上就上！
t_en: Let's do this!

t_ch: 可恶，想驾驶造物引擎！
t_en: Darn it, I wanna pilot the Engine of Creation!

t_ch: 在漫画里，它叫「毁灭引擎」啦！
t_en: In the comics, it's called the Destruction Engine!

t_ch: 我不要，让三月上吧！
t_en: I don't feel like doing this. Have March do it!

t_ch: 凭什么呀！我又不用炎枪！
t_en: That's not fair! I don't use a flaming lance!

t_ch: 今天我算是社死定了！
t_en: I'm never gonna live this down!

t_ch: 名场面重现，哈哈…还好不是我上场。{NICKNAME}，点火的时候一定要喊那个哦？
t_en: Reenacting a legendary scene right here, haha... Good thing I'm not the one up there. {NICKNAME}, you're gonna shout that line when you ignite it, right?

t_ch: 哪个？
t_en: Which one?

t_ch: 炎枪…冲锋？
t_en: Flaming lance... forward?

t_ch: 当然是「炎枪冲锋」啦！一定要高喊那个！
t_en: Of course it's "flaming lance, forward"! You've gotta shout it really loud!

t_ch: 小浣熊，你还不上吗？观众该等得着急了。
t_en: Little raccoon, aren't you going to go up there? The audience is getting anxious.

t_ch: 让我酝酿一下情绪。
t_en: Let me get into the right mood first.

t_ch: 上就上！
t_en: Let's do this!

t_ch: 无名客，无名客在哪呢？让我们用热烈的掌声再度邀请{NICKNAME}上场！
t_en: Nameless~ Where's our Nameless? Let's all give {NICKNAME} another huge round of applause and welcome them to the stage!

t_ch: 枪尖已经点燃，小朋友还有大朋友们，举起你们手中的应援棒，替可可利亚应援好不好？
t_en: The spear tip has been ignited! Kids and grown-ups alike, raise your glow-sticks high, and let's show our support for Cocolia, shall we?

t_ch: 加油啊，可可利亚大人！
t_en: You've got this, Madam Cocolia!

t_ch: 哈哈哈，看着大家这么投入，我也忍不住想喊一嗓子了。
t_en: Hahaha, seeing everyone so fired up makes me want to join in on the cheering too!

t_ch: 加油啊！可可利亚大人！
t_en: You've got this, Madam Cocolia!

t_ch: 不要输啊，可可利亚大人！
t_en: Don't give up, Madam Cocolia!

t_ch: 加油啊！我自己！
t_en: Let's go! I can do this!

t_ch: 加油啊！可可利亚大人！
t_en: You've got this, Madam Cocolia!

t_ch: 你怎么了，英子。
t_en: What's wrong, Nescia?

t_ch: …呜呜，突然有点感动，这个场景让我回想起自己翻开《苍天航路绒绒号》漫画的那一刻。
t_en: ...I'm getting all emotional. This scene takes me back to the moment I first cracked open the Fluffy Across the Blue comics.

t_ch: 飞驰的列车，斑斓的银河，还有一群奇奇怪怪却又充满冒险精神的小伙伴……
t_en: The speeding Express, dazzling cosmos, and a bunch of quirky yet adventurous companions...

t_ch: 我知道「故事」是虚构的，但我真的很想加入这个故事，想和你们一起旅行。
t_en: I know the "story" is fiction, but I really wanna be part of it and travel with you guys.

t_ch: 可惜，告别故乡对我来说可不容易……
t_en: But... leaving home? That's not exactly easy for me...

t_ch: 谢谢你的喜欢。在绒绒号里和小动物们一起旅行，也算是一起旅行过了呀！
t_en: Thanks for the love. And hey, traveling with the little animals aboard The Fluffy still counts as traveling with us in my book!

t_ch: （吟诵名句）
t_en: (Recite a famous quote)

t_ch: 有个朋友对我说过，「我们所目睹的星星虽然并非它们本来的样子，但光却不是谎言」。
t_en: A friend once told me, "the stars we see may not be their original forms, but their light isn't a lie."

t_ch: 故事就是那道光。
t_en: Our story is that very light.

t_ch: （感谢绯英的喜欢）
t_en: (Thank Evanescia for her appreciation)

t_ch: 谢谢你的喜欢。
t_en: Thank you for the love.

t_ch: 能通过故事和像你这样的朋友产生连接，这大概也是旅途最珍贵的部分了。
t_en: Being able to connect with friends like you through stories is probably the most precious part of this journey.

t_ch: 嗯！那我们去下一个展区吧？
t_en: Well said! Shall we head to the next exhibition area then?

t_ch: 好哎，走喽！
t_en: Alright, let's get moving!

t_ch: 玩得开心吗？去看看下一站有什么好东西吧。
t_en: Did you have a good time? Let's see what they have at the next stop.

t_ch: 欢迎乘坐绒绒号接驳列车！请问您是否准备前往下一站「仙舟罗浮展区」？
t_en: Welcome aboard The Fluffy Shuttle Express! Are you ready to head to our next stop, the Xianzhou Luofu Exhibition Area?

t_ch: 不得不说，这场展会，珠星办得很用心。
t_en: I have to say, Pearluxe really put care into organizing this exhibition.

t_ch: 接下来的「仙舟罗浮区」会有什么项目等我们呢？
t_en: I wonder what attractions await us in the Xianzhou Luofu Exhibition Area?

t_ch: 走吧！
t_en: Let's go!

t_ch: 等等，我还想再逛逛。
t_en: Wait, I want to explore a little more.

t_ch: 嘶——嘶，鳞渊境的寒水，何等冰冷刺骨！
t_en: Brr—brr, the frigid waters of Scalegorge Waterscape are chilling me to the bone!

t_ch: 怎么展区里冒出这么多水，难道管道漏了？
t_en: Why is there so much water in the exhibition area? Did a pipe burst or something?

t_ch: 我觉得，这应该是最新最潮的沉浸式戏剧，这次的票买的实在太值了……
t_en: I bet this is some cutting-edge immersive theater performance. I gotta say, these tickets are totally worth every penny...

t_ch: 看起来仙舟区出了点状况。
t_en: Looks like there's some trouble brewing in the Xianzhou Exhibition Area.

t_ch: 按照在「贝洛伯格区」看到的剧情风格，绒绒号在仙舟的冒险应该是……
t_en: Based on what we saw in the Belobog area, The Fluffy's adventure on the Xianzhou should be...

t_ch: 我知道了！应该就是{RUBY_B#丹恒}汪汪丹{RUBY_E#}携手{RUBY_B#景元}景元元{RUBY_E#}大战绝灭大君幻胧胧？
t_en: I got it! It must be {RUBY_B#Dan Heng}Woof Woof Dan{RUBY_E#} teaming up with {RUBY_B#Jing Yuan}Jing Yuanyuan{RUBY_E#} to battle against Lord Ravager Phanty!

t_ch: 反派名字也这么可爱吗！
t_en: Even the villain's name is so cute!

t_ch: 叠词词真的恶心心…
t_en: Ugh, those cutesy-wutesy words make me sick...

t_ch: 真羡慕你们，居然拥有一颗没看过绒绒号的脑袋。哈哈，也好，这样一来我就能一路显摆我的绒绒号小知识了！
t_en: I'm so jealous that you guys still get to experience the joy of seeing The Fluffy for the first time. Haha, well, that's fine, because this means I get to show off all my knowledge about The Fluffy!

t_ch: 要说列车在仙舟之战中，最让人印象深刻的名场面，当然是——激斗！归来的云五战队！
t_en: When people talk about the Astral Express's most memorable moment in the Xianzhou War, it can only be— the epic fight! The triumphant return of the High-Cloud Squadron!

t_ch: 云五战队是什么…
t_en: What's the High-Cloud Squadron...

t_ch: 我就知道模糊二维马会这样…
t_en: I just knew that Blurry_QR_Colt would do something like this...

t_ch: 所谓「战队」…就是由超级英雄们组成的团体啦。
t_en: When people say "squadron" they mean a bunch of superheroes teaming up.

t_ch: 我…是不是太激动了？抱歉抱歉，这样不好。
t_en: Did I... get too excited? Sorry, sorry, I really got carried away.

t_ch: 完全没有，哈哈。想来这「云五战队」就是指仙舟的「云上五骁」吧？
t_en: Not at all, haha. I'm guessing this "High-Cloud Squadron" must be referring to Xianzhou's "High-Cloud Quintet," right?

t_ch: 我…我是不是被窃忆者偷了记忆啊？咱们和幻胧对抗的过程中，有来这么多帮手吗？一次五个？
t_en: D-Did a Memosnatcher steal my memories? When we fought Phantylia, did we really have that many people helping us? Five at once?

t_ch: 这里的人什么都敢想！
t_en: These people will dream up anything!

t_ch: 这里的人什么都敢写！
t_en: There's literally nothing the people here won't write about!

t_ch: 不行了，我浑身上下都有好奇心在爬！快、快点进去看看！
t_en: I can't take it anymore! I'm bursting with curiosity! Quick, let's go inside and take a look!

t_ch: 好家伙，神还原鳞渊境啊，整个展区都被水淹得透透的！
t_en: Holy moly, they nailed the Scalegorge Waterscape! The whole exhibition area is completely submerged!

t_ch: 小浣熊小浣熊，我想看那个！
t_en: Little raccoon, little raccoon, I wanna see that thing!

t_ch: 那个？
t_en: That thing?

t_ch: 哪个？
t_en: Which one?

t_ch: 撕裂形骸~
t_en: Rending my form~

t_ch: 撕裂…形骸…解放…万钧雷霆的巨响……
t_en: Rending... my form... setting free... a thunderous roar, a symphony...

t_ch: 停！停！您收了神通罢！
t_en: Hold it right there! Please do me a favor and stop that!

t_ch: 英子说的是那个啦！小手一挥，古海分开！
t_en: Nescia means that thing! With a flick of the hand, the ancient sea splits apart!

t_ch: 我不会云吟！
t_en: I can't do cloudhymn!

t_ch: 这是丹恒干的好事啊！
t_en: That was all Dan Heng's doing!

t_ch: 汪汪丹，其实我一直是你的粉丝，从第一卷第一话第一页开始，我就已经被你深深地吸引。
t_en: Woof Woof Dan, I've actually been a huge fan of yours all along. From the very first page of Volume 1, Chapter 1, I was already captivated by you.

t_ch: 再拍马屁也没用！
t_en: Flattery will get you nowhere!

t_ch: 丹恒他今天就没来！
t_en: Dan Heng didn't even show up today!

t_ch: …这孩子求人的方式到底是跟谁学的？
t_en: ...Who on earth did this kid learn to ask favors like that from?

t_ch: 跟漫画里的三月兔呀！
t_en: From March Bunny in the comic, if you must know!

t_ch: …啊？！这、完、全、是对我本人最大的人身攻击了吧！
t_en: ...What!? This... is... absolutely... the biggest personal attack on me ever!

t_ch: 算了，我去找个人问问情况吧。
t_en: Never mind, I'll go ask someone about what's going on.

t_ch: 主持人啊，这沉浸式戏剧，未免太过「沉浸」了吧？
t_en: Hey host, this immersive theater is getting a bit TOO immersive, don't you think?

t_ch: 快等了二十分钟了，怎么开海的演员还没来？
t_en: It's been almost twenty minutes. Where is the actor who's going to split the sea?

t_ch: 没错，本展区的舞台剧剧本由仙舟著名文学家西衍先生参与指导创作，保证为各位还原最真实的列车旅行名场面！
t_en: That's right! The script for this exhibition's stage play was written under the guidance of the Xianzhou's legendary literary master, Mr. Xiyan! We guarantee you'll get an authentic re-creation of the Express's most iconic moments!

t_ch: 不就是水管破了吗？
t_en: It's just a burst pipe, isn't it?

t_ch: 西衍先生确实擅长灌水。
t_en: Mr. Xiyan sure knows how to spew nonsense.

t_ch: 是你！{NICKNAME}！不知怎么回事，突然水就漫出来了！
t_en: It's you! {NICKNAME}! I don't know what happened, but water just started gushing out everywhere!

t_ch: 拜托了！就像你当初拯救鳞渊境一样拯救一下这个展区吧！
t_en: Please! Save this exhibition area like you saved Scalegorge Waterscape before!

t_ch: 每个区都得给我整点活是吧？
t_en: So every single area's gotta have me deal with something, huh?

t_ch: 丹恒，你在哪里！深情呼唤你！
t_en: Dan Heng, where are you!? I'm calling out to you with all my heart!

t_ch: 行吧。
t_en: Alright then.

t_ch: 各位游客、各位观众你们好！各位此刻正跟随星穹列车抵达古老神秘的——仙舟！
t_en: Welcome, dear visitors and spectators! At this moment, you've arrived along with the Astral Express at the ancient and mysterious... Xianzhou!

t_ch: 是仙舟「罗浮」！
t_en: It's the Xianzhou Luofu!

t_ch: 没错——仙舟「罗浮」的鳞渊境！让我们感谢星穹列车的英雄{NICKNAME}，{F#她}{M#他}不但拯救了罗浮仙舟，还顺带在今日拯救了我们这座小小的展馆！
t_en: That's right, the Xianzhou Luofu's Scalegorge Waterscape! Let's give thanks to {NICKNAME}, hero of the Astral Express, who not only saved the Xianzhou Luofu but also happened to save our little venue today!

t_ch: 接下来，我们将进入演出环节，根据星穹列车真实冒险旅程改编的《血战鳞渊境！云五战队集结！》
t_en: And now, it's showtime! Adapted from the true adventures of the Astral Express, we present: Battle at Scalegorge Waterscape! High-Cloud Squadron Assembles!

t_ch: 感谢满愿电视台的支持——我们请来了英雄剧《破晓战队》的四位主角们担纲饰演！
t_en: Thanks to the support of Fulwish TV, we invited the four main stars of the action hero series Daybreak Squadron to perform in this show!

t_ch: 也请{NICKNAME}上台为我们重现那场驱逐绝灭大君，惊心动魄的战斗！
t_en: And now, {NICKNAME}, please come up on stage and reenact that heart-stopping battle where you drove away the Lord Ravager!

t_ch: 又是破晓战队？
t_en: Daybreak Squadron again?

t_ch: 等等，他们只有四个人啊！
t_en: Wait a sec, there's only four of them!

t_ch: 又见面了，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: We meet again, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 你们怎么还是这幅打扮？
t_en: Why are you still dressed like that?

t_ch: 好歹换一身戏服吧？
t_en: Couldn't you at least change costumes?

t_ch: 我想，没这个必要吧。
t_en: I don't think that's necessary.

t_ch: 我们扮演的不是「仙舟的英雄」吗？为什么仙舟的英雄需要假他人之手来拯救自己的国度？
t_en: Aren't we supposed to be the "heroes of the Xianzhou"? Why do the Xianzhou's heroes need to rely on others to save their land?

t_ch: 就像我们，这个世界的英雄难道不能守护我们的人民吗？难道我们不能给人民带去幸福的笑容吗？
t_en: Same as us! Shouldn't the heroes of this world be able to protect our own people? Can't we be the ones to bring happy smiles to their faces?

t_ch: 喂，你们几个人到底在胡言乱语什么啊？剧本上真的有写这些话吗？
t_en: Hey, what nonsense are you all babbling about? Is any of this actually in the script?

t_ch: 如果你们打算挑战我…
t_en: If you're planning to challenge me...

t_ch: 恐怕眼下不是个好时机。
t_en: I'm afraid now's not a good time.

t_ch: 不，恰恰相反，「星铁FES」是个最好不过的机会——
t_en: No, quite the opposite. Star Rail FEST is the perfect opportunity...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>作为踏入幻月游戏的谒者，破晓战队向你发出挑战！</color>你该不会退却吧，星穹列车的谒者？
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>As Supplicants stepping into the Phantasmoon Games, the Daybreak Squadron challenges you!</color> You wouldn't back down now, would you, Supplicant of the Astral Express?

t_ch: 什么？！——太出人意料了吧！——这次的票买的太值啦！——破晓战队居然也是谒者！
t_en: What!? ...This is so unexpected! ...These tickets were totally worth it! ...To think the Daybreak Squadron were Supplicants too!

t_ch: 啥？！这情况太、太突然了吧！
t_en: What!? This is waaaay too sudden!

t_ch: 这几个人…很不对劲。
t_en: These people... Something's not right about them.

t_ch: 我感觉…他们的情绪有些过于亢奋了。就算是热血少年漫里的角色也不会这么发言吧……
t_en: I feel like... they're way too hyped up. Even characters in action comics don't talk like this...
